decision.archive_summary: Main topic remains Codex context minor GC regression hardening. Completed work before the latest turn: added harder natural-Chinese multi-topic return case to fixed live evals, specifically `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` in `evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js`; adjusted guard behavior so packaged guard does not override a shadow-guard veto; earlier also broadened guarded relation handling to include `continue` and added the editor-update-after-detour live eval case. The user prefers solutions that are not whitelist-like or hardcoded.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is '继续', which continues the same active minor-GC/eval task rather than switching topics. For a continue relation, raw turns the next step likely depends on should stay. The most immediate dependency is the recent testing/execution context around rerunning evaluable tests, so older completed status exchanges can leave the next-turn raw prompt. Durable context worth preserving as compact pins is the user's preference against whitelist/hardcoded handling and the fact that harder Chinese multi-turn detour cases were added as part of the active regression-hardening effort.
